channel.title: Posts on La Lune Élevée
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on La Lune Élevée

item.title: How to Deploy Articles on Hugo Web Site Hosted on GitHub
item.description: How to deploy articles on Hugo website hosted on GitHub Create a deploy.sh script. Shell command should be activated by executing a chmod +x deploy.sh commmand. The following are the contents of the deploy.sh script: #!/bin/sh # If a command fails then the deploy stops set -e printf "\033[0;32mDeploying updates to GitHub...\033[0m\n" # Build the project. hugo # if using a theme, replace with `hugo -t <YOURTHEME>` # Go To Public folder cd public # Add changes to git.
